title: Handshake vs Octopus CRM — Honest Comparison for LinkedIn Automation
description: Comparing Handshake and Octopus CRM for LinkedIn automation. See features, pricing, safety, and multi-sender support side-by-side to pick the right tool for your team.

overview.handshake: Handshake is a cloud-based LinkedIn automation platform purpose-built for multi-sender rotation. Teams manage unlimited LinkedIn sender accounts from a single dashboard with built-in warmup scheduling, a unified inbox, and premium residential proxies on every plan. Pricing is based on sender accounts — not per-seat — with unlimited team collaboration included. Plans start at $69/month for 1 sender and scale through Growth ($199/mo for 5 senders) and Scale ($299/mo for 10 senders) tiers.
overview.competitor: Octopus CRM is a Chrome browser extension for LinkedIn automation, launched as a budget-friendly entry point for individuals and small businesses. It offers four pricing tiers: Starter ($9.99/mo), Pro ($14.99/mo), Advanced ($21.99/mo), and Unlimited ($39.99/mo) per LinkedIn account. Octopus CRM handles basic LinkedIn actions like connection requests, messaging, profile visits, and skill endorsements directly through a Chrome extension overlay. It supports LinkedIn Free, Premium, Sales Navigator, and Recruiter Lite accounts.

featureComparison.handshake: Built-in, core feature — rotate outreach across multiple LinkedIn accounts automatically
featureComparison.competitor: Not available — each account requires a separate Chrome profile and extension installation

featureComparison.handshake: Automated warmup scheduling with gradual ramp-up for new sender accounts
featureComparison.competitor: No automated warmup — users must manually adjust their daily limits during ramp-up

featureComparison.handshake: Single inbox for all sender accounts — manage every conversation centrally
featureComparison.competitor: No unified inbox — each account's conversations are managed within its own LinkedIn tab

featureComparison.handshake: Fully cloud-based — runs 24/7 without your browser or computer being on
featureComparison.competitor: Chrome extension — requires Chrome browser to be open and active on each account

featureComparison.handshake: Premium residential proxies included, human-like sending patterns, cloud infrastructure
featureComparison.competitor: No proxies — operates directly through your Chrome browser using your IP address

featureComparison.handshake: Unlimited team seats on every plan with shared workspaces
featureComparison.competitor: No team features — single-user tool per Chrome profile

featureComparison.handshake: Multi-step sequences with connection requests, messages, profile views, and follow-ups
featureComparison.competitor: Basic auto-connect, auto-message, and auto-visit funnels; limited sequence customization on lower plans

featureComparison.handshake: API and webhook integrations with major CRMs on all plans
featureComparison.competitor: Built-in basic CRM with HubSpot and Zapier integrations on Advanced and Unlimited plans

featureComparison.handshake: Built-in A/B testing on all plans

featureComparison.competitor: Auto-endorse connections' skills (useful for warming up relationships)

featureComparison.handshake: Advanced campaign analytics with acceptance rates, reply tracking, and sender performance
featureComparison.competitor: Basic campaign statistics and LinkedIn performance metrics
$9.99-$39.99/mo per account depending on plan tier

sections.handshakeWins:
Handshake is in a fundamentally different category from Octopus CRM. While Octopus CRM is a Chrome extension designed for individual users running basic automation from their browser, Handshake is a cloud platform built for teams scaling LinkedIn outreach across multiple accounts.

The safety difference is significant. Chrome extensions are the riskiest form of LinkedIn automation — they inject JavaScript into LinkedIn's frontend, which LinkedIn actively detects. Octopus CRM runs through your browser using your personal IP address with no proxy support. Handshake operates entirely in the cloud with dedicated residential proxies for each sender, making it substantially harder for LinkedIn to detect.

Multi-sender rotation is Handshake's defining feature, and Octopus CRM simply doesn't offer it. If you're running outreach from 5 accounts with Octopus CRM, you need 5 separate Chrome profiles, each with its own extension instance, all managed independently. With Handshake, all 5 accounts are managed from one dashboard with automatic lead distribution.

The unified inbox, A/B testing, automated warmup, and team collaboration features are all areas where Handshake delivers capabilities that Octopus CRM doesn't attempt to address. For any team larger than one person, or anyone managing more than one LinkedIn account, Handshake is dramatically more efficient.
sections.competitorWins:
Octopus CRM's strongest advantage is its price point. Starting at $9.99/month, it's one of the most affordable LinkedIn automation tools available — and for a solo user who just wants to automate basic connection requests and messages from a single account, it gets the job done at a fraction of Handshake's price.

The low barrier to entry is appealing for freelancers, solopreneurs, and small business owners who are just getting started with LinkedIn outreach and don't need multi-sender rotation or team features. The setup is straightforward — install a Chrome extension and you're running within minutes.

Octopus CRM also includes skill endorsement automation, which can be a useful relationship-warming tactic before sending a connection request. And the built-in basic CRM on higher tiers, while simple, means you don't need a separate tool for basic contact management.

For users who are already in Chrome all day and want a low-cost entry point into LinkedIn automation, Octopus CRM removes financial friction.
sections.whoShouldChooseHandshake: Choose Handshake if you're running outreach from multiple LinkedIn accounts, managing a sales team, or need a scalable solution that grows with your pipeline. It's built for agencies, B2B sales teams, and anyone who needs multi-sender rotation, a unified inbox, and enterprise-grade safety features. If your LinkedIn outreach is a core revenue driver — not a casual experiment — Handshake gives you the infrastructure to do it right.
sections.whoShouldChooseCompetitor: Choose Octopus CRM if you're an individual user on a tight budget who needs basic LinkedIn automation for a single account. It's best for freelancers or solopreneurs sending under 50 connection requests per week from one account, where the simplicity and low cost outweigh the lack of advanced features. Be aware of the safety limitations of Chrome extensions and the lack of proxy support.
sections.verdict: This comparison isn't really apples-to-apples. Octopus CRM is a budget Chrome extension for solo users ($10-$40/mo). Handshake is a cloud platform for teams scaling multi-account LinkedIn outreach ($69-$299+/mo). If you're spending $10/month on LinkedIn automation, you're probably an individual running light-touch outreach — and Octopus CRM works fine for that. But the moment you need a second LinkedIn account, team access, proper safety measures, or A/B testing, you've outgrown Octopus CRM. Handshake is where you go when LinkedIn outreach becomes a serious business function.

faqs.question: Is Octopus CRM safe for my LinkedIn account?
faqs.answer: Octopus CRM carries higher risk than cloud-based tools because it's a Chrome extension that injects code into LinkedIn's browser interface. It also operates from your personal IP address without proxy support. Cloud-based tools like Handshake are generally considered safer because they don't modify LinkedIn's frontend and use dedicated residential proxies.

faqs.question: Can I scale from Octopus CRM to Handshake?
faqs.answer: Yes. Many users start with a budget tool like Octopus CRM and upgrade to Handshake when they need multiple accounts, team collaboration, or better safety. There's no migration needed — just connect your LinkedIn accounts to Handshake and set up your campaigns.

faqs.question: Why is Handshake more expensive than Octopus CRM?
faqs.answer: Handshake includes cloud infrastructure, residential proxies, multi-sender rotation, unified inbox, team collaboration, and automated warmup — none of which Octopus CRM offers. The price difference reflects fundamentally different infrastructure and capabilities.

faqs.question: Does Octopus CRM support multi-sender rotation?
faqs.answer: No. Octopus CRM is a single-account Chrome extension. Each LinkedIn account requires its own Chrome profile with a separate extension installation. There's no way to rotate outreach across accounts or manage multiple senders from one dashboard.

faqs.question: Which tool is better for a sales team?
faqs.answer: Handshake, without question. Octopus CRM has no team features — no shared access, no unified inbox, no collaborative workspaces. Handshake includes unlimited team seats, shared campaign management, and a unified inbox across all sender accounts.
